name: ChatGPT
description: General-purpose AI assistant for writing, analysis, coding, research, and multimodal work.
studentOffer: Standard Free plan; no ongoing student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users subject to OpenAI terms and regional or age restrictions.

name: Claude
description: AI assistant for writing, analysis, coding, document review, and structured reasoning.
studentOffer: Standard Free plan; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users subject to Anthropic terms and supported regions.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI coding assistant for code completion, chat, explanation, and development workflows.
studentOffer: Eligible verified students can access GitHub Copilot Student at no charge.
eligibility: Verified students approved through GitHub Education.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor with codebase chat, completion, and agent workflows.
studentOffer: Standard Hobby access is available; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under the current free-plan limits.

name: Perplexity
description: AI answer engine with web research, citations, file analysis, and advanced models.
studentOffer: Perplexity publishes an education offer for verified university students and educators.
eligibility: Verified university students and educators; current terms may vary by region.

name: Notion AI
description: Writing, search, meeting-note, and workspace assistance inside Notion.
studentOffer: No separate student-specific Notion AI offer has been verified.
eligibility: No verified student-specific eligibility criteria; review the official product terms.

name: Gemini
description: Google’s multimodal AI assistant for research, writing, coding, and connected Google workflows.
studentOffer: Google publishes a regional AI student plan for eligible college students.
eligibility: Eligible college students in supported regions; enrollment verification and current offer terms apply.

name: JetBrains AI
description: AI assistance and agent capabilities integrated into JetBrains development tools.
studentOffer: No separate student-specific AI offer has been verified.
eligibility: No verified student-specific eligibility criteria; education IDE licensing does not automatically establish AI eligibility.

name: Windsurf
description: AI development environment with code completion, chat, and agentic coding workflows.
studentOffer: Standard free access may be available; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: General plan availability and limits are controlled by the provider.

name: Replit AI
description: Browser-based coding environment with AI-assisted application creation and development.
studentOffer: Standard Starter access; no student-specific AI offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under Replit’s current plan limits.

name: Hugging Face
description: Platform for discovering, testing, sharing, and deploying open machine-learning models and datasets.
studentOffer: Standard free account; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users subject to platform terms and resource limits.

name: Microsoft Copilot
description: General AI assistant connected to Microsoft search and productivity experiences.
studentOffer: Standard free access; no student-specific consumer offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users subject to Microsoft account, region, and age requirements.

name: Google Colab
description: Hosted notebook environment with Python, machine-learning libraries, and limited compute resources.
studentOffer: Standard no-cost Colab access; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general Google account users under current usage limits.

name: Kaggle
description: Data science platform with datasets, notebooks, competitions, courses, and community models.
studentOffer: Standard platform access; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users subject to Kaggle account and competition rules.

name: Canva Magic Studio
description: AI-assisted design, image, presentation, writing, and editing tools inside Canva.
studentOffer: Some AI tools are available under standard Canva access; no higher-education student offer verified.
eligibility: General access and usage limits depend on the current Canva plan and region.

name: Adobe Firefly
description: Generative image, video, vector, and creative-editing models from Adobe.
studentOffer: A standard free allocation may be available; no Firefly-specific student offer verified.
eligibility: General access and generative-credit limits depend on current Adobe terms.

name: Grammarly
description: AI writing assistance for grammar, rewriting, tone, and composition.
studentOffer: Standard Free plan; no individual student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under free-plan feature and usage limits.

name: DeepL
description: AI translation and writing assistance across supported languages.
studentOffer: Standard free translation access; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under current character, document, and regional limits.

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting transcription, summaries, notes, and searchable conversation records.
studentOffer: Standard Basic plan; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under current transcription and feature limits.

name: Descript
description: AI-assisted audio and video editing, transcription, voice, and production tools.
studentOffer: Standard Free plan; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under current media-hour and AI-credit limits.

name: Gamma
description: AI-assisted presentations, documents, webpages, and visual storytelling.
studentOffer: Standard Free plan; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under current AI-credit and export limits.

name: Figma AI
description: AI-assisted design, prototyping, content generation, and workflow features in Figma.
studentOffer: No separate student-specific Figma AI entitlement has been verified.
eligibility: No verified student-specific AI eligibility; access depends on Figma plan and current feature rollout.

name: Le Chat
description: Mistral’s conversational AI assistant for search, analysis, writing, and coding.
studentOffer: General access may be available; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: General availability depends on Mistral’s current plans, terms, and supported regions.

name: Poe
description: Platform for chatting with multiple AI models and user-created bots.
studentOffer: Standard free access with usage limits; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users subject to model availability, message limits, and regional terms.

name: Phind
description: AI search and assistance focused on software development and technical questions.
studentOffer: General access may be available; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: No verified student-specific eligibility criteria; review current provider terms.

name: Elicit
description: AI research assistant for finding papers, screening literature, and extracting study data.
studentOffer: Standard Basic access; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under current workflow and credit limits.

name: Consensus
description: Academic search engine that uses AI to summarize findings from research literature.
studentOffer: Standard free access may be available; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: General access and limits depend on the current provider plan.

name: NotebookLM
description: Source-grounded research and study assistant for notes, documents, summaries, and audio overviews.
studentOffer: Standard access for eligible Google accounts; no student-specific consumer offer verified.
eligibility: Available to eligible Google account users in supported regions under current terms.

name: ElevenLabs
description: AI speech, voice, dubbing, transcription, and audio-generation platform.
studentOffer: Standard Free plan; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under current credit limits and voice-use policies.

name: Runway
description: Generative video, image, motion, and creative-production AI tools.
studentOffer: Standard Free plan or credits may be available; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: General access depends on current credit limits, region, and content policies.

name: QuillBot
description: AI paraphrasing, grammar, summarization, citation, and writing tools.
studentOffer: Standard free tools; no student-specific offer verified.
eligibility: Available to general users under current mode and usage limits.

name: Wolfram|Alpha
description: Computational knowledge engine for mathematics, science, engineering, and data questions.
studentOffer: Wolfram publishes student pricing for Wolfram|Alpha Pro.
eligibility: Current students under the provider’s student-plan terms.
